# Kaulby - AI-Powered Community Monitoring

> Kaulby tracks brand mentions across 17 online platforms using AI-powered sentiment analysis. It helps startups, SaaS companies, and marketing teams monitor what people are saying about their brand, competitors, and industry in real time.

## What Kaulby Does
- Monitors 17 platforms: Reddit, Hacker News, Product Hunt, Trustpilot, G2, Yelp, YouTube, GitHub, X/Twitter, Dev.to, Hashnode, Quora, Google Reviews, App Store, Play Store, Amazon Reviews, Indie Hackers
- AI-powered sentiment analysis (positive, negative, neutral) on every mention
- Pain point detection and categorization (feature requests, complaints, comparisons)
- Real-time alerts via email, Slack, Discord, and webhooks
- Daily, weekly, and monthly digest emails with AI summaries
- Lead scoring to identify sales opportunities from community discussions
- Team workspaces with role-based permissions

## Who It's For
- Startup founders monitoring brand reputation
- SaaS companies tracking competitor mentions
- Marketing teams measuring share of voice
- Product managers finding feature requests and pain points
- Sales teams identifying warm leads from community discussions

## Pricing
- Free: 1 monitor, Reddit only, 3 keywords, basic AI analysis
- Pro ($29/mo): 10 monitors, 9 platforms, full AI analysis, email digests
- Team ($99/mo): 30 monitors, all 17 platforms, comprehensive AI, webhooks, API access, 5 team seats
- Day Pass ($10 one-time): Full Pro access for 24 hours
